description: Agavaceae includes the iconic agaves, yuccas, nolinas and their relatives — mostly rosette-forming succulents or woodystemmed monocots native to arid regions of the Americas, Africa and the Mediterranean. Dracaenaceae (Dracaena, Sansevieria) and Hyacinthaceae (Lachenalia, Ornithogalum, Ledebouria) are closely allied families of bulbous and succulent plants.
